heading: DEVELOPMENT OR REDEVELOPMENT OF PROPERTY; AD VALOREM TAX RELIEF AND ISSUANCE OF BONDS AND NOTES
operative_text: The legislature by general law may authorize cities, towns, and other taxing units to grant exemptions or other relief from ad valorem taxes on property located in a reinvestment zone for the purpose of encouraging development or redevelopment and improvement of the property.
_note: Subsection (a) extracted as operative_text. Subsection (b) exists in two versions: original (Nov. 3, 1981) and as proposed by H.J.R. 99, 87th Leg., Reg. Sess., 2021, which adds counties and imposes limits on county-issued bonds for transportation improvements. No definition of 'reinvestment zone' found in this text; term defined elsewhere in statute.
